results.engine_gap: tap-activated targeted ability + dynamic activated cost reduction (counter-aware)
results.notes: Refined docstring + comment. {3}{W},{T}: tap target with -2 cost when controller has +1/+1 counter. No activation system.

results.engine_gap: equipment system (static buff via attached_to + attack trigger forwarded through equip) + targeted unblockable + base-P/T-set EOT
aura attachment tracking + once-per-turn replacement of OBJECT_CREATED token events into copy-of-attached-permanent token events
results.notes: Refined comment. Needs make_replacement_interceptor + per-turn-fired flag + token-copy primitive.

results.engine_gap: tap-activated targeted ability grant (sorcery-speed) + EOT-bounded damage-trigger granted to a target + opponent-may-self-ping clause
results.notes: Refined comment. Grants a temporary triggered ability and an opponent choice.

results.engine_gap: tap-activated reanimation (sorcery-speed) + ability suppression + Skeleton subtype-add (continuous effect)
results.notes: Refined comment. Reanimation needs activation; subtype/ability rewriting needs continuous-effect support.

results.engine_gap: tap-activated targeted ability dispatch + sorcery-speed gating
results.notes: Refined comment. Effect (PT_MODIFICATION + temporary keyword grant) is supported; activation isn't.

results.engine_gap: activated mana ability ({T}: {R}) + activated targeted pump (sorcery-speed)
results.notes: Refined comment. Both activated abilities blocked by activation gap.

results.engine_gap: equipment system + ability-grant-to-equipped + control-opponent action + dynamic cost reduction by equipped creature's power
results.notes: Refined comment. Multiple stacked engine gaps.

results.engine_gap: activated mana abilities (basic + threshold-gated alt) with charge-counter scaling
results.notes: Refined comment. Station charge tracking exists; activated mana dispatch does not.

results.engine_gap: activated ability with sacrifice cost + dynamic cost reduction (X = differently-named lands)
results.notes: Refined comment. Flying/hexproof come from card text; activation system needed.

results.engine_gap: activated ability with tap+sacrifice cost + targeted destroy + dynamic cost reduction (Spacecraft-attacked-this-turn flag tracking)
results.notes: Refined comment. Activation + per-turn attack tracking needed.

results.engine_gap: enters-tapped land flag + activated mana ability + charge-counter-threshold-gated activated targeted token-copy (sorcery-speed)
results.notes: Refined comment. Land mana abilities, threshold gating, and token-copy primitive all blocked.

results.engine_gap: enters-tapped land flag + activated mana ability + charge-counter-threshold-gated activated mana ability (X = creatures-you-control count)
enters-tapped land flag + activated mana ability + charge-counter-threshold-gated activated ability with sacrifice cost (token + temporary mass pump-and-haste)
activated mana ability + activated ability with variable tap-X-artifacts cost + activated token-creation ability
enters-tapped land flag + activated mana ability + charge-counter-threshold-gated activated ability with multi-component cost (life payment + sacrifice) + dynamic draw count
enters-tapped land flag + activated mana ability + charge-counter-threshold-gated activated mana ability (X = artifacts-you-control count)
